response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with excellent leadership, mentoring, and system design skills. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, having primarily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang throughout his career. Additionally, while he has solid microservices and cloud experience, his background aligns more closely with full-stack product engineering than the deep, large-scale hardware and cloud compute platform infrastructure required for this specific role.
strengths: Strong background in technical leadership, mentoring, and championing engineering best practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Proven experience designing and scaling distributed systems, including microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated ability to own end-to-end architecture and deliver large, ambiguous technical projects (e.g., founding GISCollective).
concerns: Severely lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience, showing only a few months of professional C/C++ usage.
Career history leans heavily toward full-stack web and application development rather than low-level cloud compute and hardware architecture.
Limited explicit experience managing or mentoring specifically within dedicated Cloud or DevOps engineering teams.
